TERMS & CONDITIONS
IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE

Archies Gallery Terms & Conditions
1. This is an Archies Gift Voucher (GV)/e-Pay and can be redeemed for any product at the listed Archies outlets and on archiesonline.com.
2. The person who has the Archies GV/e-Pay is deemed to be the beneficiary.
3. Once the GV is added to the e-Pay balance, it cannot be used at retail outlets.
4. The GV/e-Pay CANNOT be revalidated once expired or cancelled under any circumstances.
5. The e-Pay balance must be linked to the registered mobile number.
6. The GV can be converted into e-Pay and used partially at the holder's convenience.
7. After conversion into the e-Pay balance, this GV is valid for partial redemption. The balance would remain in the e-Pay balance and can be used for multiple transactions within the validity period on the website only.
8. The GV/e-Pay is non-refundable and cannot be exchanged, transferred, resold, or redeemed for cash.
9. Multiple GVs can be combined and added to the e-Pay balance for online redemption.
10. Multiple GVs can be used against one bill for outlet redemption.
11. At the outlet, the beneficiary should inform the cashier about using the GV/e-Pay before billing.
12. The GV/e-Pay is not valid for partial redemption at the outlet. The remaining balance will be forfeited once the GV/e-Pay is redeemed.
13. No credit note/refund for the unused amount of the GV/e-Pay will be given.
14. The GV/e-Pay can be clubbed with existing offers.
15. Archies/GyFTR is not responsible if the GV/e-Pay is lost, damaged, stolen, or used without permission.
16. The GV/e-Pay cannot be redeemed on specific block-out dates. Archies may add or delete any date at its sole discretion.
17. If the GV/e-Pay gets blocked on account of a technical issue, it will be reactivated within 72 hours.
18. Any dispute related to the GV/e-Pay should be referred to the issuing company, and the decision of the issuing company shall be final.
19. The GV/e-Pay has been issued subject to the terms of the company.
20. Archies makes every effort to accept the GV/e-Pay, but on account of any technical or administrative reasons, an outlet may refuse to accept it.
21. Only the listed Archies outlets will accept the GV/e-Pay at their sole discretion. Archies may add or remove an outlet without prior notice.
22. Archies/GyFTR reserves the right to withdraw, modify, cancel, or change the offer at any point without prior notice and at its sole discretion.
23. For any queries/issues related to GV/e-Pay, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com or care@archiesworldwide.com or call 1800-103-3445.

Croma Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Croma GV (Gift Voucher)/GC (Gift Card) and would only be accepted at the listed Croma outlets and on the Croma website at www.croma.com.
2. The holder of the GV/GC is deemed to be the beneficiary.
3. The GV/GC can be clubbed with the existing offers.
4. Once the GV/GC is issued, the company will not entertain any request from anybody for its cancellation.
5. Only 5 GV/GCs can be redeemed on a single invoice on Croma.com.
6. This is a one-time use GV/GC.
7. The GV/GC cannot be reloaded.
8. No refund/credit note shall be issued for unused parts of the GV/GC.
9. The GV/GC CANNOT be revalidated once expired or canceled under any circumstances.
10. GV/GCs are non-refundable, may not be exchanged, transferred, or resold, and may not be redeemed for cash.
11. Croma/GyFTR is not responsible for lost, damaged, or stolen GV/GCs.
12. If the purchase value exceeds the value of the GV/GC, the differential amount of such purchase should be paid using the other modes of payment available on the website.
13. In case of returns/cancellations of the redemption done via GV/GC, the refund of the same will be done to the effect of the value of the contribution of the GV/GC to the sale. The balance will be done via the contribution of the other respective payment modes to the sale. In the case of multiple products being purchased and a combination of the GV/GC and any other mode of payment being used to complete the transaction, the individual products being sold will get the assignment of the value of the GV/GC and any other mode of payment being used based on the tender percentage contribution in total order value. The refund will happen in the same percentage split per the original tender.
14. Any dispute should be referred to the company from which the GV/GC has been received, and the company's decision shall be final.
15. Any dispute relating to the GV/GC shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Mumbai.
16. The GV/GCs are subject to applicable laws. The company and GV/GC holder shall comply with all applicable laws promulgated by any statutory/judicial/competent authority from time to time in this regard.
17. Infiniti Retail Ltd shall be entitled to amend these terms and conditions from time to time. Any change in these terms and conditions can be viewed on our website and/or at any of the Croma stores.
18. Croma/GyFTR reserves the right to withdraw, modify, cancel, or change the offer at any point without prior notice and at its sole discretion.
19. For any queries/issues related to GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com or contact any Croma store/check balance on www.croma.com or contact our Croma care at 186026627662 | 04046517910.

Levis Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Levi’s Gift Voucher (GV)/e-Pay and can be redeemed for any product in the listed stores/mobile app/at https://levi.in/.

7. GV/GCs are valid only in select cities and geographical locations where BigBasket operates, subject to availability. If a GV/GC is purchased and used in a city where BigBasket does not operate, the amount will not be reimbursed/refunded.

• Purchases of any product from the electronics category.
• Purchases of any products sold by third-party sellers listed on the platform, like café, pharmacy, and such other categories.
• Purchase of cigarettes, cigars, cheroots, beedis, cigarette tobacco, pipe tobacco, hookah tobacco, chewing tobacco, snuff, pan masala, or any chewing material having tobacco as one of its ingredients (by whatever name called), gutka, and/or tooth powder containing tobacco.
• Purchase of infant food, infant milk substitute, and/or feeding bottles.
• Such other products or categories, as may be determined by BigBasket at its sole discretion.
10. GV/GC cannot be redeemed for cash and/or credited to the source account.
11. The GV/GC is not a legal tender or replacement for a debit/credit card.
12. GV/GCs are non-refundable, non-exchangeable, non-transferable, and non-resaleable.
13. BigBasket reserves the right to change, cancel, or update any of the terms and conditions at any time without prior notice.
14. If a customer misplaces the GV/GC, BigBasket shall not be responsible for any reimbursement/refund for such a Gift Card amount or issue of a duplicate Gift Card.
15. For more details, please refer to the Terms and Conditions as provided on www.bigbasket.com/fp/mobile/terms-and-conditions/.
16. BigBasket reserves the right to suspend/discontinue bbWallet services wherein the GV/GCs are redeemed in case of any suspected misuse, abuse or violations of the Terms and Conditions[www.bigbasket.com/fp/mobile/terms-and-conditions/].
17. Neither BigBasket nor GyFTR shall be responsible for lost, damaged, or stolen GV/GCs.
18. For any questions or issues related to the purchase of GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

zee5.Terms & Conditions:
TERMS & CONDITIONS
IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE
WATCH VIDEO
Zee5 Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Zee5 subscription GV/GC (Gift Voucher/Gift Card) that will be accepted on the website through this URL: https://www.zee5.com/ and the Zee5 application (Android only).
2. Click the following link to visit Zee5 subscription offerings: https://www.zee5.com/myaccount/subscription
3. No credit note/refund for the unused balance amount of the GV will be given.
4. Any such unused balance amount shall stand lapsed automatically.
5. The user with the GV/GC is deemed the beneficiary.
6. Only one GV/GC can be used for one subscription.
7. This is a one-time use GV/GC with an expiration date.
8. The GV/GC CANNOT be revalidated once expired or canceled under any circumstances.
9. The GV/GC cannot be clubbed with any existing offer on its website.
10. Zee5/GyFTR is not responsible if the GV/GC is lost, stolen, or used without permission.
11. Zee5/GyFTR reserves the right to withdraw, modify, cancel, or change the offer at any point without prior notice and at its sole discretion.
12. The GV/GCs are not for resale nor redeemable for cash.
13. The above subscription GV/GC is valid in India only.
14. Subscription will start immediately after GV/GC redemption.
15. GV/GC cannot be redeemed on specific blackout dates. Zee5 may add or delete any date(s)/period(s) at its sole discretion without any liability.
16. Any dispute related to the GV/GC should be referred to the issuing company, and the decision of the issuing company shall be final. In case of any legal disputes, the courts in Delhi shall have the exclusive jurisdiction.
17. Zee5 shall, on a best effort basis, attempt to accept GV/GC, but on account of any technical reason or for any reason beyond the control of Zee5, GV/GC may not get accepted, and Zee5 shall have no liability for the same.
18. If a GV/GC gets blocked on account of a technical issue, it would get enabled in 72 hours. In case of transaction failures after GV/GC is applied, the amount would be automatically refunded to the same cards within 48 hours.
19. Zee5 reserves the right to edit/change the terms and conditions for the GV/GC at any time without any notice or liability.
20. Zee5 has the final authority on the interpretation of these rules.
21. Zee5 reserves the right to deny accepting any GV/GC if it suspects that there is duplicity of cards.
22. For any queries/issues related to GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

6. The GV/e-Pay balance cannot be transferred to another e-Pay account, exchanged for cash, or converted into any other form of currency.
7. The e-Pay balance must be linked to the registered mobile number.
8. After conversion into e-Pay balance, this GV is valid for partial redemption. The balance would remain in the e-Pay balance and can be used for multiple transactions within the validity period.
9. Only valid GV/e-Pay at the sole discretion of The Man Company shall be accepted for redemption.
10. The Man Company reserves the right to deny accepting GV/e-Pay if it suspects duplicity.
11. The GV/e-Pay cannot be redeemed on specific block-out dates as may be intimated/updated by The Man Company on its website from time to time. The Man Company may add or delete any date(s)/period(s) on its sole discretion without any liability.
12. Any dispute related to the GV/e-Pay should be referred to the issuing company, and the decision of the issuing company shall be final. In case of any legal disputes, the courts at Mumbai shall have the exclusive jurisdiction.

1. This is a Luxe Gift Voucher/Gift Card (GV/GC) and it is redeemable at more than 45+ participatory brands across India.

12. The GV/GCs are not for resale nor redeemable for cash.

14. For balance enquiry & validity, please SMS BAL space 16-Digit Luxe Gift Card Number to 9704200300 or visit any merchant location.

1. This is a Taj Experiences GV/GC (Gift Voucher/Gift Card), issued by The Indian Hotels Company Limited (“Taj” / “the Company”). It can be redeemed only offline at participating hotels. Check Participating Hotels at https://www.tajhotels.com/en-in/gifting-and-shopping/e-gift-cards.
2. To check the balance and validity of the GV/GC, please visit https://www.tajhotels.com/en-in/gifting-and-shopping/e-gift-cards and enter the GV/GC number in the Check Balance section.
3. Valid Taj Experiences GV/GCs can be reloaded till their expiry date on www.tajhotels.com/giftcards, subject to a maximum GV/GC balance of Rs. 1,00,000. The GV/GC will be automatically revalidated from the date of load or reload. Revalidation requests will not be processed outside these terms.
4. The GV/GC can be clubbed with existing offers.
5. The GV/GC may be redeemed towards spends on rooms, food and beverages, spa, other services, and applicable taxes at Taj, SeleQtions, Gateway, Vivanta hotels, and Ama Trails & Stays in India.
6. The GV/GC cannot be used for retail spends at third-party outlets, business centre equipment hire, hired services from third-party sources, or expenses of a personal nature for which a payout is raised, such as medicines or repairs of personal items. The GV/GC is also not valid at The Claridges, Tree of Life Resorts, and Ginger Hotels.
7. The GV/GC can also be redeemed for prepaid room reservations for hotels in India through Taj Reservations Worldwide.
8. Multiple transactions can be performed using the GV/GC until the GV/GC value is exhausted.
9. If the purchase value exceeds the GV/GC value, the differential amount may be loaded on the GV/GC or paid at the point of sale through cash or an accepted credit/debit card at the time of purchase.
10. A valid GV/GC in its original form or email must be presented at the time of availing a service.
11. For prepaid room reservations through Taj Reservations Worldwide, the GV/GC number and PIN must be quoted while making the reservation. The entire amount must be paid through the GV/GC to secure the reservation. In case the GV/GC balance is less than the due amount, the GV/GC may be reloaded before processing the reservation. Standard cancellation policies shall apply. For eligible refunds arising from cancellations, customers must contact Taj Reservations Worldwide.
12. The GV/GC shall not be valid for use at any other service establishment or for withdrawal of cash.
13. No refund, replacement, or cash back shall be provided against the GV/GC. Once issued, the GV/GC cannot be cancelled.
14. Taj Experiences GV/GCs are cash-equivalent bearer GV/GCs. The Company is not responsible for, and will not replace, lost or stolen GV/GCs.
15. Redemption of the GV/GC by its bearer shall be considered a valid discharge of the Company’s liabilities in respect of the GV/GC.
16. Any dispute related to the GV/GC should be referred to The Indian Hotels Company Limited, and the decision of the Company shall be final.
17. Any further dispute related to the GV/GC shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at Mumbai.
18. The GV/GC is subject to applicable laws. The Company, purchaser, and GV/GC bearer shall comply with all applicable laws promulgated by any statutory, judicial, or competent authority from time to time.
19. The Company reserves the right to amend these terms and conditions from time to time. Any changes can be viewed on its website.
20. For any other queries, please call Taj Reservations Worldwide at 1800-111-825 or +91-22-6601-1825, or email reservations@tajhotels.com.

7. A maximum of 3 GV/e-Pay can be combined and used in 1 booking.
8. Products and services are subject to availability.
9. This GV/e-Pay cannot be redeemed offline for Flights and Hotels.
10. The GV/e-Pay can also be used for cab and Bus bookings.
11. The GV/e-Pay is not valid on Tours & Attractions, Visa, Cruise, Forex Card & Currency, and Travel Insurance.
12. This GV/e-Pay is not applicable with the Pay Later payment option (Book Now Pay Later/Reserve Now Pay Later) on Flights, Trains, Cabs, and Buses.
13. GV/e-Pay cannot be clubbed with any other ongoing offer, discount/cash back/promotion run by makemytrip.com on the app or website.
14. The GV/e-Pay balance cannot be transferred to another e-Pay account, exchanged for cash, or converted into any other form of currency.
15. The GV/e-Pay CANNOT be revalidated once expired or cancelled under any circumstances.

18. Any dispute should be referred to the company from which the GV/e-Pay has been received, and the company's decision shall be final.
19. MakeMyTrip/GyFTR reserves the right to withdraw, modify, cancel, or change the offer at any point without prior notice and at its sole discretion.
20. In case of cancellation of bookings made using the GV/e-Pay within the validity period, the amount will be reversed to the same GV/e-Pay as used at the time of booking.
21. Users are required to save the GV/e-Pay number to utilize this refunded amount, as we will not be able to reissue a new GV/e-Pay number.
22. In case of transaction failures, after GV/e-Pay is applied, the amount will be automatically refunded to the same GV/e-Pay within 24 hours.
23. MakeMyTrip and Gyftr are the final authorities on the interpretation of these rules.
24. MakeMyTrip reserves the right to deny accepting any GV/e-Pay if it suspects that cards are duplicated.
25. In no event, the liability of MakeMyTrip for any claims shall exceed the GV/e-Pay value.
26. In the event of any dispute, the parties agree to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of New Delhi.
27. This is for individual use only. Travel agents found using the GV/e-Pay would lead to cancellation of the booking, and no refund would be made.
28. For any issue or query regarding MakeMyTrip e-Pay Gift Cards, please write to giftvouchers@makemytrip.com or www.gvhelpdesk.com.

IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE
WATCH VIDEO
Amazon Prime Membership Terms & Conditions
1. This is an Amazon Prime subscription GV (Gift Voucher)/GC (Gift Card) is a prepaid payment instrument that can be used to purchase Amazon Prime memberships (3-months, 12-months, Prime Shopping edition or Prime Lite plan) or Amazon Pay Anytime Gift cards (inactive zero value gift card) from Amazon.in.
2. GV/GC has an expiry of 12 months from the date of activation, subject to applicable terms.
3. The GV/GC cannot be transferred or cancelled once it is issued (please reach out to the issuer (Pine Labs) for any assistance in this regard). Additionally, as per Amazon business guidelines, GV/GC cannot be claimed on Amazon Business accounts.
4. Credit and Debit Cards issued outside India cannot be used to purchase a GV/GC
5. The user with the GV/GC is deemed the beneficiary.
6. Only one GV/GC can be used for one subscription.
7. GV/GC cannot be used to purchase any other physical or digital product on Amazon.in, including but not limited to: (i) products on 'Global Store' on Amazon.in, recharges, all kinds of bill payments, all kinds of ticket bookings, and financial products on Amazon.in. (ii) purchase Amazon Pay gift cards (pre-loaded) on Amazon.in (iii) pay for mixed item order if the order has at least one non-eligible item.
8. Offer is valid for new users only, who are subscribing to Amazon Prime for the first time
9. GV/GC cannot be used to purchase Prime membership plans if the customer has telecom provider (Airtel, VI, Jio, etc.) activated Prime membership on the same Amazon account.
10. Existing Amazon Prime members who purchased an Amazon Prime/Prime Lite membership via Google Play are not eligible to redeem GV/GC for extending/upgrading the Amazon Prime membership.
11. Beneficiaries of the GV/GC can apply the 13-digit numeric code on https://www.amazon.in/vouchers and add the voucher balance in his/her Amazon.in account.
12. Customers can add a maximum balance of INR 1799/- to their Amazon Prime voucher balance.
13. Amazon Prime membership activated via GV/GC can't be cancelled and is nonrefundable.
14. Customers can redeem a partial GV/GC once per calendar year. This limit applies regardless of where the voucher is obtained from.
15. GV/GC cannot be transferred for value or redeemed for cash.
16. The above subscription GV/GC is valid in India only.
17. Subscription will start immediately after GV/GC redemption.
18. Pine Labs, Amazon, or their affiliates are not responsible if a GV/GC is lost, stolen, destroyed, or used without permission.
19. Amazon.in logo/trademark is an IP of Amazon or its affiliates, and the Pine Labs trademark/logo is an IP of Pine Labs.
20. Pine Labs reserves the right to change these Voucher terms and conditions from time to time in its discretion and without prior notice to you. All terms and conditions are applicable to the extent permitted by law.
21. For detailed terms & conditions and frequently asked questions, please click here.

Planet Fashion Gift Voucher Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Planet Fashion Gift Voucher (GV) / Gift Card (GC) and would be accepted at listed outlets.

5. Only the listed Planet Fashion outlets at its sole discretion accept the GV / GC. Planet Fashion may add or remove an outlet without giving any prior notice.

15. If GV / GC gets blocked on account of a technical issue, it will get enabled in 3 working days.
16. Please contact the shop manager for any acceptance issue and if the issue is still not resolved, you can raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

oven-story.Terms & Conditions:
TERMS & CONDITIONS
IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE
Oven Story Terms & Conditions
1. This is an Oven Story GV/GC (Gift Voucher/Gift Card) and is valid for online orders placed through the EatSure application/website at https://www.eatsure.com/. The GV/GC is applicable across available cities.
2. The holder of the GV/GC is deemed to be the beneficiary.
3. The GV/GC will be converted into ‘EatSure wallet balance’, and the wallet balance can be used partially.
4. Multiple GV/GC can be combined and added to the EatSure wallet balance.
5. The wallet balance must be linked to the registered mobile number and can be automatically fetched on the EatSure app.
6. GV/GC can be used to buy discounted items on the EatSure app, but it cannot be clubbed with other aggregator offers.
7. The GV/GC cannot be transferred to another wallet account, exchanged for cash, or used for any other form of currency.
8. Rebel Foods Private Limited, GyFTR, or its affiliates shall not be responsible if the beneficiary shares the GV/GC number or account credentials, resulting in unauthorized use of the GV/GC or wallet balance.
9. Once purchased, the GV/GC is non-refundable, non-cancellable, and non-exchangeable.
10. Lost GV/GCs will not be refunded, and expired balances cannot be revalidated.
11. If the order value exceeds the wallet balance, the remaining amount must be paid via other available payment methods.
12. Rebel Foods Private Limited/GyFTR reserves the right to amend, modify, add, or delete any terms and conditions of the offer without prior notice.
13. The GV/GC may be denied if misuse or abuse is suspected, without providing any explanation to the customer.
14. For any queries/issues related to GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

HOW TO USE

TERMS & CONDITIONS
IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE

STEP

2

3
STEP

4
STEP

pret-a-manger-luxe-gift-card.Terms & Conditions:
TERMS & CONDITIONS
IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE
STORE LOCATOR
Pret A Manger-Luxe Gift Card Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Luxe Gift Voucher/Gift Card (GV/GC) and it is redeemable at more than 45+ participatory brands across India.
2. The GV/GC can also be used online on Armani Exchange, Steve Madden, Diesel India, Superdry, Mothercare India, GAS, Sunglass Hut India, Muji, Hamleys, Satya Paul, Brooks Brothers, Hunkemoller, Tumi, Pottery Barn, West Elm, Ritu Kumar.
3. The holder of the GV/GC is deemed to be the beneficiary.
4. Luxe Gift Card is not redeemable at airport stores.
5. The GV/GC cannot be revalidated once expired or cancelled under any circumstances.
6. This is a one-time use GV/GC.
7. Multiple GV/GC can be used for one bill.
8. In case the value of the merchandise exceeds the value of the GV/GC, the difference shall be paid by the bearer. No refund/credit note shall be issued for unused parts of the GV/GC.
9. Protect the Luxe Gift Card to avoid misuse. Reliance Brands Limited/Qwikcilver Solutions Private Limited/GyFTR shall not assume any liability in case the PIN gets stolen/compromised, Reliance Brands Limited shall neither replace the Luxe Gift Card nor refund in any form.
10. Once issued, the GV/GC cannot be blocked.
11. The GV/GC can be redeemed only against full priced merchandise.
12. The GV/GCs are not for resale nor redeemable for cash.
13. To activate the Luxe GV/GC, SMS ACT space 16-Digit Luxe Gift Card Number space 6-Digit Luxe Gift Card Pin to 9704200300
14. For balance enquiry & validity, please SMS BAL space 16-Digit Luxe Gift Card Number to 9704200300 or visit any merchant location.
15. For complete T&Cs, participating brands, and store locations visit luxegiftcard.com For bulk inquiries or assistance, contact us at info@luxegiftcard.com
16. For any queries/issues related to GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

Ajio Luxe Terms & Conditions
1. This is an AJIO Luxe GV/GC (Gift Voucher/Gift Card) issued by Pine Labs Limited, which is a company incorporated under the laws of India, and is authorised by the Reserve Bank of India ("RBI") to issue such Gift Cards. AJIO Luxe GV/GC is redeemable on luxe.AJIO.com.

5. GV/GC cannot be used to purchase other Gift Cards on AJIO Luxe or related platforms.

7. Once the GV/GC is loaded into the user’s AJIO Wallet, it can be used partially.
AJIO Luxe wallet balance is not transferable to any other account or bank account.
8. If the value of Eligible Products purchased is less than the GV/GC balance, the outstanding amount will remain as AJIO Cash in the holder’s AJIO Wallet. It can be used for future purchases within the validity period. It will not be clubbed with any other offer.
9. The GV/GC cannot be redeemed for the purchase of Gold and/or Silver idols, coins, fine jewellery, and all other forms of precious metals listed on the AJIO Platform, or any other products that Reliance may exclude at its sole discretion.
10. If the order value exceeds the GV/GC balance, the user must pay the difference through other payment methods.
11. Orders placed using the GV/GC are subject to the availability of Eligible Products and governed by the AJIO Luxe Platform Terms and policies.
12. Once the GV/GC is sent to the customer, they must protect the GV/GC PIN or number. AJIO/GyFTR is not responsible for misuse due to loss of confidential details caused by the customer’s fault, and no refund will be issued for such GV/GC.
13. AJIO/Pine Labs may cancel a GV/GC without liability if purchased fraudulently or if the beneficiary's KYC details are incorrect or invalid. Funds will be refunded to the source. Accurate information must be provided during purchase, and additional KYC/AML documents might be requested.
14. You agree and understand that GV/GC are prepaid payment instruments regulated by RBI. AJIO/Pine Labs may be required to share purchaser/redeemer KYC and transaction details with RBI or other statutory authorities and may contact you for such information.
15. AJIO and/or GyFTR are not responsible for unauthorized use of the GV/GC. You agree to keep the activation code confidential and acknowledge sole responsibility for its secrecy.
16. For cancellations, returns, or refunds related to purchases made via this GV/GC, please refer to the AJIO Luxe Platform “Cancellation, Return, and Refund” policies or contact AJIO Luxe customer care.
17. AJIO/GyFTR/Pine Labs are not liable for lost, stolen, destroyed, or unauthorized use of this GV/GC or AJIO Wallet balance; the holder is responsible for safe custody and security.
18. If GV/GC is blocked due to a technical issue, it will be enabled within 72 hours.
19. AJIO Luxe/GyFTR reserves the right to withdraw, modify, cancel, or change the offer at any time without prior notice and at its sole discretion.
20. Any dispute related to GV/GC should be referred to AJIO, and AJIO’s decision shall be final.
21. All taxes, duties, levies, or other charges related to redemption of this GV/GC and purchase of Eligible Products shall be borne solely by the holder.
22. For any queries or issues related to this GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

liberty.Terms & Conditions:
TERMS & CONDITIONS
IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE
STORE LOCATOR
Liberty Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Liberty Offline GV (Gift Voucher)/e-Pay that will be accepted at select Liberty stores across India.
2. The person who has the GV/e-Pay is deemed to be the beneficiary.
3. The GV/e-Pay can be clubbed with the existing offers.
4. The GV/e-Pay can be used for all purchases of products and services at the listed Liberty stores.
5. The GV can be converted into e-Pay as per the holder's convenience.
6. The GV/e-Pay balance cannot be transferred to another e-Pay account, exchanged for cash, or converted into any other form of currency.
7. The e-Pay balance must be linked to the registered mobile number.
8. After conversion into e-Pay balance, this GV is valid for partial redemption. The balance would remain in the e-Pay balance and can be used for multiple transactions within the validity period.
9. Only valid GV/e-Pay at the sole discretion of Liberty shall be accepted for redemption.
10. The GV/e-Pay CANNOT be revalidated once expired or canceled under any circumstances.
11. Liberty/GyFTR is not responsible if the GV/e-Pay is lost, stolen, or used without permission.
12. If GV/e-Pay gets blocked on account of a technical issue, it will be enabled in 72 hours.
13. Any dispute should be referred to the company from which the GV/e-Pay has been received, and the company's decision shall be final.
14. Liberty/GyFTR reserves the right to withdraw, modify, cancel, or change the offer at any point without prior notice and at its sole discretion.
15. For any queries or issues related to GV/e-Payraise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

CHARLES TYRWHITT- Luxe Gift Card Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Luxe Gift Voucher/Gift Card (GV/GC) and it is redeemable at more than 45+ participatory brands across India.
2. The GV/GC can also be used online on Armani Exchange, Steve Madden, Diesel India, Superdry, Mothercare India, GAS, Sunglass Hut India, Muji, Hamleys, Satya Paul, Brooks Brothers, Hunkemoller, Tumi, Pottery Barn, West Elm, Ritu Kumar.
3. The holder of the GV/GC is deemed to be the beneficiary.
4. Luxe Gift Card is not redeemable at airport stores.
5. The GV/GC cannot be revalidated once expired or cancelled under any circumstances.
6. This is a one-time use GV/GC.
7. Multiple GV/GC can be used for one bill.
8. In case the value of the merchandise exceeds the value of the GV/GC, the difference shall be paid by the bearer. No refund/credit note shall be issued for unused parts of the GV/GC.
9. Protect the Luxe Gift Card to avoid misuse. Reliance Brands Limited/Qwikcilver Solutions Private Limited/GyFTR shall not assume any liability in case the PIN gets stolen/compromised, Reliance Brands Limited shall neither replace the Luxe Gift Card nor refund in any form.
10. Once issued, the GV/GC cannot be blocked.
11. The GV/GC can be redeemed only against full priced merchandise.
12. The GV/GCs are not for resale nor redeemable for cash.
13. To activate the Luxe GV/GC, SMS ACT space 16-Digit Luxe Gift Card Number space 6-Digit Luxe Gift Card Pin to 9704200300
14. For balance enquiry & validity, please SMS BAL space 16-Digit Luxe Gift Card Number to 9704200300 or visit any merchant location.
15. For complete T&Cs, participating brands, and store locations visit luxegiftcard.com For bulk inquiries or assistance, contact us at info@luxegiftcard.com
16. For any queries/issues related to GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

me-n-moms.Terms & Conditions:
TERMS & CONDITIONS
IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS
HOW TO USE
Me N Moms Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Me n Moms GV/e-Pay that will be accepted on the website at https://www.menmoms.in.
2. The user with the GV/e-Pay is deemed to be the beneficiary.
3. GV/e-Pay can be used for all purchases of products and services on the Me n Moms website.
4. The GV can be converted into e-Pay as per the convenience of the holder.
5. After conversion into e-Pay balance, this GV is valid for partial redemption. The balance would remain in the e-Pay balance and can be used for multiple transactions within the validity period.
6. The e-Pay balance must be linked to the registered mobile number.
7. Only valid GV/e-Pay at the sole discretion of Me n Moms shall be accepted for redemption.
8. GV/e-Pay balance cannot be transferred to another e-Pay account, exchanged for cash, or any other form of currency.
9. GV/e-Pay CANNOT be revalidated once expired or canceled under any circumstances.
10. Me n Moms/GyFTR is not responsible if the GV/e-Pay is lost, stolen, or used without permission.
11. Me n Moms, GyFTR, or its affiliates shall not be responsible if the beneficiary shares the GV number, PIN, or account credentials, resulting in unauthorized use of the GV/e-Pay balance.
12. If the GV/e-Pay gets blocked on account of a technical issue, it will be enabled in 72 hours.
13. Any dispute should be referred to the company from which the GV/e-Pay has been received, and the company’s decision shall be final.
14. Me n Moms/GyFTR reserves the right to withdraw, modify, cancel, or change the offer at any point without prior notice and at its sole discretion.
15. Once issued, the GV/e-Pay cannot be canceled or blocked under any circumstances.
16. For any queries/issues related to GV/e-Pay, please raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

Zoomcar Terms & Conditions
1. This is a Zoomcar Gift Voucher (GV)/Gift Card (GC) and will be accepted only online on the Zoomcar mobile application.
2. The person having the GV/GC is deemed to be the beneficiary.
3. This is a one time use GV/GC. Multiple GV/GC can be added to customer’s account as ZCash and the balance can be used partially or fully for multiple transactions.
4. The GV/GC can be used for the purchase of ZCash, which is credited to the Customer’s Zoomcar ZCash wallet upon redemption. A single ZCash shall be equivalent to INR 1 (One Rupee).
5. This GV/GC is valid for six (6) months from date of issuance and once redeemed for Zoom Cash shall remain valid for one (1) year.
6. The GV/GC can be clubbed with the existing offers.
7. The GV/GC is not a legal tender or replacement for a debit/credit card.
8. The offer is valid for availing all self-drive services on Zoomcar including daily drives and subscription vehicle bookings, available on the Zoomcar App
9. All customer bookings are governed by the Zoomcar Host Services Terms and Conditions available at https://www.zoomcar.com/in/bangalore/host-policy.
10. GV/GCs are non-refundable, may not be exchanged, transferred, or resold, and may not be redeemed for cash.
11. Zoomcar/GyFTR reserves the right to change, cancel, or update any of the terms and conditions of this offer at any time without prior notice.
12. Zoomcar may choose not to honor the offer if there is any suspicion of misuse or abuse of the offer, and we are not required to explain such cases.
13. In the event of a technical issue leading to the temporary blockage of a valid Zoomcar GC, Zoomcar shall endeavor to reactivate the same within 72 hours, subject to internal verification.
14. Zoomcar/GyFTR is not responsible for lost, damaged, or stolen GV/GCs.
15. For any questions or issues related to GV/GC, raise a request at www.gvhelpdesk.com.

Air India Fly Rajasthan Terms & Conditions
1. This is an Air India Fly Rajasthan GV/GC (Gift Voucher/Gift Card) issued by Air India and will be accepted on the website at www.airindia.com and the Air India mobile app.
2. The holder of the GV/GC is deemed to be the beneficiary.
3. The GV/GC is valid for one-way and return journeys on Domestic Flights between 1st May 2026 and 31st July 2026 on the following routes only:
JAI (Jaipur): BOM, BLR, CCU, HYD, DEL, MAA, AMD, PNQ, GAU, GOI, GOX, IXC, NMI, STV, COK, IDR, DED, LKO, BBI, NAG, RPR, VNS, JSA, IXR, PAT, CJB, DIB
UDR (Udaipur): DEL, BOM, BLR, HYD, JAI, CCU, MAA, IXC, COK, PNQ, LKO, RPR, GOI, NAG, VNS
JDH (Jodhpur): BOM, DEL, BLR, HYD, PNQ, MAA, CCU, AMD, JAI, COK, BBI, CJB, IDR, SXR
4. The GV/GC can be used to book Air India tickets and ancillary products only. It cannot be used to avail travel insurance, upgrades, or any goods or services offered by any third party other than Air India.
5. The GV/GC cannot be redeemed through any offline channel such as a call centre, customer service centre, or airport ticketing centre.
6. The GV/GC cannot be redeemed for group travel.
7. The GV/GC is for individual use only. If travel agents are found purchasing or using the GV/GC, the booking will be cancelled, and no refund will be issued.
8. The GV/GC can be combined with any existing offer, discount, cash back, or promotion offered on the Air India website (except where the offer is tied to a specific payment method).
9. Up to 3 GV/GCs can be combined and used in a single transaction. If 3 GV/GCs are used, the value of the third GV/GC must meet or exceed the remainder payment amount; otherwise, only 2 GV/GCs can be used along with another mode of payment.
10. Multiple GV/GCs can be added to the Air India Wallet at giftcards.airindia.com/en-in/wallet/login. Once added, the GV/GC balance is merged with the Wallet, and the original GV/GC is no longer required for redemption.
11. The GV/GC is valid for partial redemption. The balance will remain in the GV/GC or Air India Wallet within the validity period and can be used for multiple transactions until the balance is exhausted.

14. The GV/GC balance cannot be transferred to another Wallet account, exchanged for cash, or converted into any other form of currency. Once added to the Wallet, the GV/GC is no longer transferable.
15. The GV/GC CANNOT be revalidated once expired or cancelled under any circumstances. Any lapsed or unused amount will not be compensated.
16. The GV/GC is non-refundable and cannot be exchanged, transferred, resold, or redeemed for cash. Any unlawful resale or attempted resale is grounds for seizure and cancellation of the GV/GC without compensation.
17. In case of cancellation of a booking made using the GV/GC within the validity period, the amount deducted from the GV/GC will be reversed to the same GV/GC or Wallet. In case of cancellations after the GV/GC validity has expired, no refund will be processed for the amount paid through the expired GV/GC.
18. In the event of a transaction failure due to technical reasons, the corresponding amount will be recredited to the GV/GC or Wallet within 24 hours.
19. Air India/GyFTR is not responsible if the GV/GC is lost, stolen, or used without permission. The beneficiary is solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of the GV/GC number and PIN.
